We Care Today

For A Better Tomorrow.

Welcome to Rehema Care, where we specialize in personalized healthcare services designed to enhance well-being and promote independence. Explore our offerings and discover how we can support your unique needs on your path to better health and a brighter future.

about us

What to expect from us

At Rehema Care, our dedicated team is committed to delivering exceptional healthcare services with a focus on compassion and individualized care. With years of experience, we strive to make a positive impact, enhancing the well-being of those we serve and becoming your trusted partner in achieving better health and a higher quality of life.

learn more

Interested in a career?

Give us a call to learn more about available job positions and career opportunities. 

623-323-7203

Services we offer

More Information

Attendant Care

Attendant Care at Rehema Care offers personalized support and assistance for daily activities, promoting independence and well-being for our clients.

Learn More

Habilitation Group Home

Habilitation Group Homes at Rehema Care offer a communal living setting with specialized care and skill-building opportunities for individuals with unique needs.

Learn More

Habilitation

Habilitation at Rehema Care focuses on skill development and support to help individuals achieve their maximum potential and lead fulfilling lives.

Learn More

Respite Care

Respite Care at Rehema Care provides temporary relief and support for caregivers while ensuring the well-being and comfort of their loved ones where they currently live and are cared for.

Learn More

Caring is what we do best

Contact Us
Services
  • Group Home (HAB)
  • HCBS Respite (RSP)
  • HCBS Habilitation (HAH)
  • HCBS Attendant Care (ATC)
